name: issue-driven-development
description: IDD methodology marketplace: issue-driven workflow for AI-assisted development. Every change starts with an issue, every issue is diagnosed before implementation, every implementation is scope-controlled, every completion is independently verified, every closure is documented.

plugins.name: issue-driven-dev
plugins.description: v2.37.0: External-agent / PR mode for idd-verify + use-case routing reference. NEW idd-verify --pr <N> input mode for verifying PRs opened by external agents (Codex via codex exec, Copilot Workspace, remote claw on PsychQuantClaw) — gh pr diff + gh pr checkout so reviewer agents see file context, auto-restore original branch after verify. Plus --commits N / --since <ref> / --branch <name> flags for other input sources. Auto-detect mode (no flag): counts unpushed Refs #N commits since origin/<default> first; if 0, queries open PRs ref'ing #N and AskUserQuestion to pick between local diff vs PR. Issue↔PR correspondence is a hard iron rule: PR mode aborts before invoking 6-AI ensemble if PR body has zero Refs #N or if user-passed issue isn't in PR's Refs set. PR mode flips master comment location: full verify report posts to PR, each ref'd issue gets a 1-line pointer comment back. Capture-master-URL-then-write-pointer SOP enforced. NEW references/external-agent-delegation.md is canonical contract; NEW references/usecase-routing.md closes discoverability gap with 24-row table mapping common scenarios → exact skill chain + flags + contract doc. Backward compat: single-issue invocation idd-verify #42 without flags still works as v2.36 in common case; cluster-PR mode #34 #36 #38 unchanged.
